properties.title: 4-Bedroom Luxury Duplex, Lekki Phase 1
properties.description: Stunning 4-bedroom luxury duplex in the heart of Lekki Phase 1. Fully detached, BQ, swimming pool, 24/7 security, backup power. C of O available. Perfect for families and diaspora investors.

properties.title: 3-Bedroom Serviced Apartment, Victoria Island
properties.description: Premium serviced apartment on Victoria Island. 24/7 facility management, gym, rooftop pool, concierge service. Walking distance to major banks and embassies. Ideal for executives and investors.

properties.title: Prime Land — 2 Plots, Ibeju-Lekki
properties.description: Two plots of prime dry land in fast-growing Ibeju-Lekki corridor. 3 minutes from Dangote Refinery access road. Deed of Assignment available. Excellent investment opportunity — values doubling every 18 months.
